edge_not_inherited_note: weekly s19 edge UNTESTED; NOT inherited from s18; must be re-proven at s19 P6 IS (K1/K2); a null/negative s19 = s18 was universe-specific
framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (52a3b60); carried by-reference; not redefined at P1
inherited_constraints_block_C6_carried_v: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, s19 IS-only) PASSES: aggregate 226; per-fold F1/F2/F3 54/79/71; OOS projected ~90-117/2y.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

REPLICATION OF s18 (NOT a tune/_revN_): mechanic byte-identical to the OOS_CONFIRMED s18 weekly spec (7e6aa36); ONLY the universe changes (24 independent names). s18 frozen/untouched. The edge is NOT inherited.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: s18 OOS edge was thin + recently-weak (F5 negative). The s19 edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s19 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0). A null/negative s19 = s18 was universe-specific (accepted, informative).

STOP-BEFORE-PROMOTION (terminal, NOT a tune): pre-SEAL K9 PASSED; the EDGE is the open gate. If s19 P6 IS edge negative/zero, OR K13 <3/5, OR P10 OOS K9 <50/y -> terminal. A param/cadence change = NOT a replication (a different fresh candidate).
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): RS-rotation native weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18; NOT tuned, NOT searched).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).
DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal; cost_drag <<5% (s18 ~0.95%/y).
split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse s19 DR9-passed CSVs (574fa9e); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061 spin-off applied+verified.
24-name INDEPENDENT universe LOCKED; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 (independent) by sealed result 574fa9e (0c8e21f2); cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 ~8 sectors); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
s18/s17/s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal-or-frozen preserved verbatim; s19 is a FRESH replication sibling; clears T-FORBID-16..24; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: replication of locked s18 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.
